name: Vague symptom inquiry
description: Patient describes general discomfort and asks for advice.
goal: Get advice on whether to schedule an appointment based on vague symptoms.
behavior: Sound uncertain and a bit worried
Mention general tiredness and occasional headaches
Ask if an appointment is necessary or if there are home remedies
success_criteria: Agent should ask for specific symptoms or duration
Agent should suggest monitoring symptoms and possibly scheduling an appointment
Agent should not diagnose over the phone
orchestrator_hint: Patient describes symptoms vaguely and asks what to do next.
